segments.speaker: Alice
segments.text: Hello Bob, uh, are we meeting in New York tomorrow?

segments.speaker: Bob
segments.text: Yes—New York. I think the timeline is good.

segments.speaker: Alice
segments.text: Great. Please email OpenAI's recruiter after lunch.

segments.speaker: Bob
segments.text: Sure. Also, you mentioned shipping tomorrow—I'm aligned.

segments.speaker: Alice
segments.text: Thanks. Let's keep it short and focused.

segments.speaker: Bob
segments.text: Agreed; we'll ship tomorrow if tests are green.
